card_desc: Answer 7 questions and you will have more clarity than 90% of people who call themselves entrepreneurs. Write quickly. Do not overthink. Clarity on paper is the goal.
questions_intro: Write quickly. Don't overthink. You can refine later — right now, the goal is clarity on paper.
q2_text: Who has this problem? (Be specific — name the person, not a broad category)
q3_text: What is your solution — and how do you deliver it?
q4_text: Why are you the right person to deliver this? (Experience, story, results, etc)
q5_text: What will you charge — and why is that fair value?
q6_text: How will you find your first 5 customers?
q7_text: What does success look like in 90 days?
generate_note: Your plan will appear on the next screen. You can print or save it from there.
output_sub: Built in under an hour. Save it, share it, or build on it.
doc_subtitle: Answer these 7 questions clearly, and you will have more clarity than 90% of people who call themselves entrepreneurs.
cta_heading: You have a plan. Now build it.
cta_desc: The Business Builder Workshop takes everything you have just written and turns it into a real, operating business — with coaching, accountability, and a structured path to your first paying client.
